title: revision_brief
description: Stage 12 — Revision brief that translates a playtest diagnostic into actionable improvement instructions for the next patch. Specifies what to change, what to preserve, and what the next pass should prove.

revision_goal.description: One sentence: what this revision achieves and why it matters for the learner.

source_diagnostic_version.description: Version number of the playtest_diagnostic_report this brief is responding to.

change_now.description: Items that must change in this revision.

preserve.description: Things that are working and must NOT be broken by this revision.

out_of_scope.description: Improvements explicitly deferred — do not address these in this revision.

next_pass.description: Which pass does this revision target? tuning_only = no new pass file needed.

change_id.description: Sequential ID, format R01, R02, etc.

acceptance_signal.description: Observable condition that proves this change is done correctly.

constraint_notes.description: Engineering or design constraints that must be respected during this revision.

open_questions.description: Design questions raised by the diagnostic that need resolution before or during implementation.
